cases.name: Minimal product page with intentional space

classification.design_thesis: Create a typographic, editorial, playful, and memorable expressive personal web experience whose typographic narrative reveal with controlled pacing, asymmetry, and a decisive final signature makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Minimal expressive controls with clear labels, visible focus, and styling derived from the message
direction_profile.composition: Typographic narrative reveal with controlled pacing, asymmetry, and a decisive final signature
direction_profile.hero: Treat the message as a staged opening beat that evolves into the page rather than a static marketing hero
direction_profile.palette_material: High-contrast concept-specific field with one deliberate accent and restrained texture
direction_profile.typography: Expressive display typography with editorial scale contrast and a calm readable support face

classification.design_thesis: Create a inventive, technical, energetic, welcoming, and structurally distinctive community team site whose rallying identity-led opening followed by a clear story, current activity, and one participation path makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Open community sections, technical labels where relevant, and clear join/support actions without card saturation
direction_profile.composition: Rallying identity-led opening followed by a clear story, current activity, and one participation path
direction_profile.direction: inventive, technical, energetic, welcoming, and structurally distinctive
direction_profile.hero: Identity-led team statement paired with real work or a domain-derived graphic system
direction_profile.palette_material: Context-led team colors with structural lines, labels, or diagrams rather than generic tech glow
direction_profile.typography: Technical display details balanced by friendly, readable body typography

classification.design_thesis: Create a welcoming, focused, energetic, and community-led community team site whose rallying identity-led opening followed by a clear story, current activity, and one participation path makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Open community sections, technical labels where relevant, and clear join/support actions without card saturation
direction_profile.composition: Rallying identity-led opening followed by a clear story, current activity, and one participation path
direction_profile.hero: Identity-led team statement paired with real work or a domain-derived graphic system
direction_profile.palette_material: Context-led team colors with structural lines, labels, or diagrams rather than generic tech glow
direction_profile.typography: Technical display details balanced by friendly, readable body typography

cases.name: Minimal AI study group landing page

classification.design_thesis: Create a experimental, editorial, authored, memorable, and evidence-led expressive portfolio whose authored editorial sequence with an unmistakable opening claim and project evidence in varied rhythm makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Editorial project entries with varied but systematic hierarchy, minimal card chrome, and clear contact actions
direction_profile.composition: Authored editorial sequence with an unmistakable opening claim and project evidence in varied rhythm
direction_profile.direction: experimental, editorial, authored, memorable, and evidence-led
direction_profile.hero: Authored opening statement integrated with project evidence rather than an isolated generic hero
direction_profile.palette_material: Confident context-specific contrast, limited accent logic, and tactile editorial surfaces
direction_profile.typography: Characterful display voice paired with disciplined, highly readable project detail

classification.design_thesis: Create a experimental, immersive, kinetic, concept-led, and readable conceptual web experience whose concept-led sequence that transforms the sentence through scale, rhythm, and spatial tension makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Sparse controls integrated into the narrative with strong focus and reduced-motion equivalents
direction_profile.composition: Concept-led sequence that transforms the sentence through scale, rhythm, and spatial tension
direction_profile.direction: experimental, immersive, kinetic, concept-led, and readable
direction_profile.hero: Begin inside the concept, using the sentence as an evolving spatial object rather than a generic headline block
direction_profile.palette_material: Purposeful light, texture, and mechanical contrast derived from the sentence
direction_profile.typography: Expressive editorial type that carries the concept with readable supporting annotation

classification.design_thesis: Create a typographic, editorial, playful, and memorable expressive personal web experience whose typographic narrative reveal with controlled pacing, asymmetry, and a decisive final signature makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Minimal expressive controls with clear labels, visible focus, and styling derived from the message
direction_profile.composition: Typographic narrative reveal with controlled pacing, asymmetry, and a decisive final signature
direction_profile.hero: Treat the message as a staged opening beat that evolves into the page rather than a static marketing hero
direction_profile.palette_material: High-contrast concept-specific field with one deliberate accent and restrained texture
direction_profile.typography: Expressive display typography with editorial scale contrast and a calm readable support face

classification.design_thesis: Create a refined, product-specific, restrained, precise, and materially grounded premium product redesign whose product-led editorial hierarchy with generous but purposeful rhythm, decisive detail, and minimal decorative chrome makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Precise role-based details, refined states, and restrained surfaces derived from the product
direction_profile.composition: Product-led editorial hierarchy with generous but purposeful rhythm, decisive detail, and minimal decorative chrome
direction_profile.direction: refined, product-specific, restrained, precise, and materially grounded
direction_profile.hero: Lead with product evidence and positioning, not empty scale or slow spectacle
direction_profile.palette_material: Controlled palette and material cues grounded in the product; no automatic black background or gold accent
direction_profile.typography: Brand- and product-appropriate hierarchy with polished spacing and resilient loading behavior; no automatic giant serif

classification.design_thesis: Create a institutional, calm, highly legible, familiar, and recovery-oriented public service application page whose task-first linear flow with plain-language hierarchy, visible progress, and nearby recovery guidance makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Familiar native-first controls, strong labels, visible focus, clear summaries, and conservative geometry
direction_profile.composition: Task-first linear flow with plain-language hierarchy, visible progress, and nearby recovery guidance
direction_profile.direction: institutional, calm, highly legible, familiar, and recovery-oriented
direction_profile.hero: No marketing hero; begin with service identity, task title, eligibility context, and next action
direction_profile.palette_material: High-contrast civic palette with quiet surfaces and explicit status colors plus non-color cues
direction_profile.typography: Highly legible humanist sans with restrained hierarchy, clear numerals, and generous reading rhythm

classification.design_thesis: Create a calm, precise, data-forward, restrained, and trustworthy product interface whose dense but controlled dashboard with portfolio summary, allocation and change views, visible units, timestamps, and drill-down hierarchy makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Aligned data regions, refined tables and charts, clear filters, strong selection, and restrained elevation
direction_profile.composition: Dense but controlled dashboard with portfolio summary, allocation and change views, visible units, timestamps, and drill-down hierarchy
direction_profile.direction: calm, precise, data-forward, restrained, and trustworthy
direction_profile.hero: No marketing hero; use an information header with portfolio scope, timestamp, freshness, and primary filters
direction_profile.palette_material: Restrained neutral surfaces with one brand accent and semantic positive, negative, neutral, pending, and unavailable states
direction_profile.typography: Excellent numeric typography with tabular figures, explicit units/currencies, compact labels, and readable commentary

classification.design_thesis: Create a calm, precise, familiar, privacy-conscious, and trustworthy banking onboarding flow whose stepwise onboarding with explicit requirements, progress, review, confirmation, and recoverable errors makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Predictable forms, explicit selection states, review summaries, and consequence-matched confirmations
direction_profile.composition: Stepwise onboarding with explicit requirements, progress, review, confirmation, and recoverable errors
direction_profile.direction: calm, precise, familiar, privacy-conscious, and trustworthy
direction_profile.hero: No campaign hero; open with task purpose, requirements, time expectation, and security context
direction_profile.palette_material: Restrained brand palette, neutral form surfaces, strong focus, and redundant risk/status cues
direction_profile.typography: Highly readable sans with tabular numerals, explicit field hierarchy, and compact supporting disclosure text

classification.design_thesis: Create a dense, precise, analytical, controlled, and professionally distinctive investment analytics interface whose workspace composition with persistent filters, dense comparative views, aligned data hierarchy, and progressive analytical detail makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Compact tables, charts, segmented comparisons, keyboard-friendly filters, and explicit disclosure panels
direction_profile.composition: Workspace composition with persistent filters, dense comparative views, aligned data hierarchy, and progressive analytical detail
direction_profile.direction: dense, precise, analytical, controlled, and professionally distinctive
direction_profile.hero: No hero; begin with workspace title, data scope, freshness, and high-value analytical controls
direction_profile.palette_material: Controlled high-density surfaces with restrained semantic color and clear active, warning, stale, and unavailable treatments
direction_profile.typography: Compact technical hierarchy with tabular numerals, explicit units, strong column alignment, and code-like metadata where useful

classification.design_thesis: Create a calm professional, efficient, information-dense, and quietly distinctive enterprise product interface whose persistent application shell with task-prioritized density, clear status, and progressive detail makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Dense but calm controls, clear tables, permission-aware actions, and consistent state surfaces
direction_profile.composition: Persistent application shell with task-prioritized density, clear status, and progressive detail
direction_profile.direction: calm professional, efficient, information-dense, and quietly distinctive
direction_profile.hero: No landing-page hero inside the product; foreground the current task, scope, and status
direction_profile.palette_material: Restrained brand expression through alignment, proportion, and state polish rather than decorative effects
direction_profile.typography: Compact professional hierarchy with strong labels, tabular data where needed, and readable long-form help

classification.design_thesis: Create a technical, precise, fast, information-rich, and purposefully branded developer tool interface whose keyboard-first technical workspace or documentation/product split with clear command, output, and error hierarchy makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Keyboard-visible controls, precise inputs, inspectable output panels, and strong loading/error states
direction_profile.composition: Keyboard-first technical workspace or documentation/product split with clear command, output, and error hierarchy
direction_profile.direction: technical, precise, fast, information-rich, and purposefully branded
direction_profile.hero: Use a compact technical proposition with an immediate real example or working surface
direction_profile.palette_material: Purposeful technical identity using contrast, syntax roles, grids, or structural marks without decorative clutter
direction_profile.typography: Strong code and data typography paired with a precise UI sans and resilient line lengths

classification.design_thesis: Create a refined, product-specific, tactile, credible, and conversion-clear premium ecommerce product page whose product-evidence editorial composition with decisive imagery, material detail, price, variants, delivery, and purchase action makes the primary task unmistakable while preserving accessibility, trust, and production integrity.

direction_profile.components: Refined but familiar variants, quantity, disclosure, delivery, error, and cart controls
direction_profile.composition: Product-evidence editorial composition with decisive imagery, material detail, price, variants, delivery, and purchase action
direction_profile.direction: refined, product-specific, tactile, credible, and conversion-clear
direction_profile.hero: Product-first image and product evidence composition with price and action in immediate reach
direction_profile.palette_material: Palette and surfaces derived from the actual product and brand; never default to black, gold, or excessive whitespace
direction_profile.typography: Brand-appropriate type chosen from product positioning, balanced by highly legible commerce details and numerals

methodology.hybrid: Canonical corpus with creative-profile classification, stage-specific autonomous routing, metadata, exact/lexical scoring, deterministic synonym expansion, reranking, dedupe, mandatory preservation, and budgets.
methodology.latency_note: Latency is observed wall time and therefore informational, while relevance scoring and selection are deterministic for a fixed corpus.
methodology.lexical: Canonical corpus with metadata and exact/keyword scoring; synonym expansion disabled.
methodology.static-skill: Small offline mandatory kernel, capped at five records.

results.name: Premium/pro source cannot be copied without entitlement and terms
Awwwards, Mobbin, and Page Flows remain inspiration-only
Complex accessible widgets route to maintained primitives
21st.dev MCP is optional tooling rather than design authority
Corporate event marketing is excluded from pullable catalogs
Discovery produces deterministic candidate reports without promotion
